creator: jas@cse.yorku.ca
text:
I have a FreeBSD 9.1RC3 NFSv4 server exporting a share to a Red Hat 6.3 NFSv4 client.  If I reboot the FreeBSD server, the RH 6.3 client does not reconnect to the share unless I forcibly unmount it, and remount it.  The same operation works fine between a RH6.3 NFSv4 server and client.

How-To-Repeat: 1) Export NFSv4 share to RH63 client
2) Mount the exported filesystem on the RH63 client
3) Reboot the FreeBSD server -- client doesn't reconnect.
